fact: The first official cricket Test match was played in 1877 between Australia and England at the Melbourne Cricket Ground. Australia won by 45 runs.
India won the ICC Cricket World Cup in 1983 under the captaincy of Kapil Dev.
Sachin Tendulkar is the highest run scorer in international cricket.
The FIFA World Cup was first held in 1930 in Uruguay.
Brazil has won the FIFA World Cup five times, more than any other nation.
Lionel Messi captained Argentina to victory in the 2022 FIFA World Cup.
The Thomas Cup is the premier international men's team badminton championship.
India won its first Thomas Cup title in 2022 by defeating Indonesia.
P. V. Sindhu became the first Indian woman to win a BWF World Championship gold medal in 2019.
